blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,788 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
